title: 9 Inch Stainless Steel Food Serving Tongs Buffet Tongs Cooking Tong for Cooking, Salad, Meat, BBQ, Frying, Serving （3pcs）
features: Stainless Steel: Our kitchen tongs are made of premium stainless steel material, ensuring durability and resistance to corrosion.
The serving utensils feature a mirror polished surface that not only adds a touch of sophistication to your dining experience but also makes cleaning a breeze.

Each utensil in our stainless steel set has been carefully crafted with a comfortable weight and thickness. The polished edges ensure a smooth and safe grip, preventing any scratching or discomfort when handling the utensils.
Whether it's a party, wedding, outdoor dinner, family gathering, or buffet restaurant use, our serving utensils set is suitable for all occasions.

By choosing our kitchen tongs, you're making a conscious decision to reduce plastic waste. Unlike single-use plastic utensils, our stainless steel set is designed to last, allowing you to enjoy the benefits of reusable, eco-friendly utensils for years to come.
description: Product Description LEEPAT Kitchen Tongs Set of 3, 9Inch Premium Stainless Steel Cooking Tongs for all your needs, cooking, barbecue, buffet, salad, ice, bread Easy to Clean and Store Easy to clean No extra gaps, not easy to hide stains, healthy to use. It can be washed directly in the dishwasher without damage. Silicone Coated Handle The handles are slip-proof which have the silicone covering, protect your hands from scald. Soft handle precisly firmly hold vegetables, fish, and meat when transported to and from the grill. NOTICE 1. Please wash the stainless steel tongs set with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process; 2. Please clean and air dry the cooking tongs after using for your healthy daily use, and store them in dry place for its durability; 3. You can use it in various ways, Great versatility that can be used for all your cooking, grilling or barbeque (BBQ) needs. Specifications: Color: Silver Green Material: 304 Stainless steel Straight tong: 9inch Quantity: 3 pieces Weight:210 g
